_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE AUTO GENERATED — offmine Next.js egg
name: offmine
author: admin@offmine.ru
description: offmine — Next.js 16 app powered by Bun

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates curl unzip

# install bun
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
export BUN_INSTALL="/root/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"

# clone or update
git config --global --add safe.directory /mnt/server
if [ -d /mnt/server/.git ]; then
  git -C /mnt/server fetch origin
  git -C /mnt/server reset --hard origin/${GIT_BRANCH}
else
  git clone --branch ${GIT_BRANCH} https://github.com/BADtochka/offmine.git /mnt/server
fi

cd /mnt/server
bun install
bun run build

[ -d /mnt/server/.next ] || { echo '[egg] ERROR: .next dir missing after build'; exit 1; }

echo '[egg] install done'

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: Port the Next.js app listens on. Must match the allocation in Pterodactyl.

variables.name: Startup Command
variables.description: Command to run when the container starts.

variables.name: Hostname / Bind Address
variables.description: Hostname or bind address for the server.
